title: Beach Days
description: Fun in the sun! Adds various Minecraft-like beach essentials!
body:
# ☀︎ Beach Days!

All the essentials to turn your world into a beach extravaganza! This datapack adds fun beach activities and items to make your coastal adventures more exciting!
![Beach Days!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5a272e96610acf7f44524d9888bbfc3929cf470.png)
## Features!

### Frisbees
Throw frisbees with (kinda) realistic physics! Hold right-click to charge your throw, then release to launch. Available in all 16 dye colors!

<details>
<summary>Frisbee</summary>

![two frisbees, 1 in item form, and 1 in dropped form](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/471f0ebf7e7a32481bf9459af69c4ada63940aa8.png)

</details>





### Sandcastles
Build impressive sandcastles on the beach! Use your beach pail to scoop sand and place some sand castles! (red and white sand)

<details>
<summary>Sand Castles</summary>

![8 Sand castle variations, red and white sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee235aaaeca626f88307f02ee48237a71e8fbbff.png)

</details>


### Beach Pail
Your essential beach tool! Fill it with sand to build sandcastles.

<details>
<summary>Beach Pails</summary>

![3 Beach pails, 1 with sand, 1 with red sand, 1 with nothing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/091dd2fd2f87759bc4f0193ded9abd477369b7d9.png)

</details>




### Umbrella
A nice shady umbrella you can place in item frames. Available in all 16 dye colors!

<details>
<summary>Umbrellas</summary>

![2 Yellow Umbrellas, one dropped, and one placed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d05858d0a051453326a1f5145fea4e490a098bf.png)

</details>



### Sunglasses + Swim Fins
Shade your eyes from the sun stylishly, and
speed your underwater swims with some flippers!

<details>
<summary>Sunglasses and Swim Fins</summary>

![a Pair of sunglasses, and swim fins on display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a7e9ff54769a0c9cea9cd2634401d8047c79e9.png)

</details>

*Grab your frisbee, build some sandcastles, and enjoy the beach life!* 🌊
